Motion To Dismiss Appellant, Mayra Chiquete'S Appeal; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar May-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT SHIRLEY REYES'S Motion to Dismiss Appellant, Mayra Chiquete's Appeal. Appearances: Ellen Mendelson, Esq. of Law Offices of Ellen Mendelson PC, (415) 585-0815, appearing for Appellant, Mayra Chiquete; Robert D. Resner, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 482-9500, appearing for Respondent and moving party, Shirley Reyes. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted, in part. Appellant to post a bond by May 13, 2009. If appellant fails to do so, respondent may seek dismissal by ex parte application. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Motion To Dismiss Appellant, Mayra Chiquete'S Appeal; Request For Judicial Notice

Argued and the Court rules as follows: Matter is continued to May 6, 2009, Appellant's counsel to file any Declaration or argument regarding inability of Appellant to post bond, by noon on May 5, 2009.
